title: Ruben Blades Is Not My Name
original_title: Yo no me llamo Rubén Blades
overview: The story of one of Latin America's most beloved singer-songwriters in a journey across his 50-year career. In an intimate way, the film gives us a chance to get to know the artist, his music, and the stories behind them.
